title: matelea proctorii
intro: Matelea proctorii, also known as the "Queen of the Prairie" or "Dogbane Vine", is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea proctorii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Matelea proctorii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
